hero-description: Find useful SPARQL queries, understand what information they provide, and learn how to adapt them without starting from scratch.
topic-memoria-desc: Explore commemorative monuments, memory sites, and historical landmarks documented in Wikidata for Latin American countries.
topic-biodiversidad-desc: Discover endangered species, protected areas, and environmental data from Latin America on Wikidata.
topic-dominio-publico-desc: Explore artworks, historical figures, and cultural data in the public domain from the region.
query-monumentos-desc: Find commemorative monuments from a country registered on Wikidata. Includes coordinates, image, and inauguration date when available.
query-lugares-memoria-desc: Locate historical memory sites in a specific country. Includes coordinates and site description.
query-especies-desc: Query endangered species of a country, with conservation status, image, and population when available.
query-areas-bio-desc: Explore protected natural areas of a country, with geographic coordinates, protection category, and size.
query-obras-desc: Find artworks from a country with images available on Wikidata. Includes creation date and author when available.
query-personajes-desc: Discover historical figures from a country with images on Wikidata. Includes birth date, death date, and occupation.
search-placeholder: Type a country, topic or keyword
no-results: No queries found for your search. Try another country, topic or term.
query-not-found-desc: The query you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
playground-error: There was an error running the query. Check the SPARQL and try again.
query-monumentos-what-it-does: Retrieves commemorative monuments of a country registered on Wikidata, including geographic coordinates, image, and inauguration date when available.
query-monumentos-use-case-1: Create cultural maps of historical memory
query-monumentos-use-case-2: Identify commemoration sites in a territory
query-monumentos-use-case-3: Document monumental heritage for Wikidata projects
query-monumentos-adapt-note-1: Change the country identifier (Q298) to your country of interest.
query-monumentos-adapt-note-2: You can adjust the monument type using other Wikidata identifiers.
query-monumentos-adapt-note-3: Add an image filter if you only want monuments with a photo available.
query-monumentos-step-1-description: Replace the country identifier with that of your region or country of interest.
query-monumentos-step-2-description: You can change Q500004 (commemorative monument) to Q4989906 (monument) to broaden results.
query-monumentos-step-3-description: To show only monuments with an image available, add a FILTER EXISTS.
query-lugares-memoria-what-it-does: Locates historical memory sites in a specific country. Includes coordinates and site description.
query-lugares-memoria-use-case-2: Investigate human rights violations documented on Wikidata
query-lugares-memoria-adapt-note-1: Change the country identifier (Q298) to your region of interest.
query-lugares-memoria-adapt-note-2: You can change the memory site type to another related type.
query-lugares-memoria-adapt-note-3: Use wdt:P131 to filter by a specific administrative region.
query-lugares-memoria-step-1-description: Replace the country identifier with that of your interest.
query-lugares-memoria-step-2-description: You can change Q18134653 (memory site) to Q1322322 (memorial) or another type.
query-lugares-memoria-step-3-description: Use wdt:P131 to restrict results to a specific region, city, or community.
query-especies-what-it-does: Queries endangered species of a country, with conservation status, image, and population when available.
query-especies-use-case-1: Analyze conservation status of fauna and flora
query-especies-use-case-3: Identify priority species for conservation campaigns
query-especies-adapt-note-1: Change the country identifier (Q298) to your country of interest.
query-especies-adapt-note-2: Modify the conservation values in VALUES to adjust statuses.
query-especies-adapt-note-3: Change P183 to P17 if you prefer species present in the country rather than native.
query-especies-step-1-description: Replace the country identifier with that of your interest.
query-especies-step-2-description: Modify the VALUES to include only the statuses you are interested in.
query-especies-step-3-title: Change country of origin to presence
query-especies-step-3-description: If you prefer species present in the country instead of native, change P183 to P17.
query-areas-bio-what-it-does: Explores protected natural areas of a country, with geographic coordinates, protection category, and size.
query-areas-bio-use-case-1: Map protected areas of a country
query-areas-bio-use-case-3: Compare size and category of parks and reserves
query-areas-bio-adapt-note-1: Change the country identifier (Q298) to your country of interest.
query-areas-bio-adapt-note-2: Change Q179049 to Q46169 to filter only national parks.
query-areas-bio-adapt-note-3: Use wdt:P2046 to filter areas larger or smaller than a size.
query-areas-bio-step-1-description: Replace the country identifier with that of your interest.
query-areas-bio-step-2-description: Change Q179049 (protected area) to Q46169 (national park) for more specific results.
query-areas-bio-step-3-description: Use wdt:P2046 to filter areas larger or smaller than a given value.
query-obras-what-it-does: Finds artworks from a country with images available on Wikidata. Includes creation date and author when available.
query-obras-use-case-1: Discover artworks in the public domain
query-obras-use-case-2: Identify authors and creators from a country
query-obras-use-case-3: Create cultural galleries for educational projects
query-obras-adapt-note-1: Change the creator's country identifier (Q298) to your country.
query-obras-adapt-note-2: Change Q33231 to Q5 if you are looking for authors instead of artworks.
query-obras-adapt-note-3: Make the image OPTIONAL to include artworks without a photo.
query-obras-step-1-description: Replace the country identifier associated with the creator.
query-obras-step-2-description: You can change Q33231 (work of art) to Q5 (person) if you are looking for authors instead of artworks.
query-obras-step-3-description: Remove the image line or make it OPTIONAL to include more results.
query-personajes-what-it-does: Discovers historical figures from a country with images on Wikidata. Includes birth date, death date, and occupation.
query-personajes-use-case-1: Identify historical figures in the public domain
query-personajes-adapt-note-1: Change the country of citizenship identifier (Q298) to your country.
query-personajes-adapt-note-2: Add a death date filter to ensure public domain status.
query-personajes-adapt-note-3: Use wdt:P106 to restrict to a specific profession.
query-personajes-step-1-description: Replace the country of citizenship identifier with that of your interest.
query-personajes-step-2-description: Add a death date filter to ensure people are in the public domain.
query-personajes-step-3-description: Use wdt:P106 to restrict to a specific profession, such as writer (Q82955) or painter (Q33880).
